scenes.description: 黄色小熊站在木门前,表情从疑惑转为惊恐。镜头切换至巨大的豌豆藤蔓,兔子和小猫在上面显得害怕。文字提示豌豆藤蔓异常生长,气氛紧张。
scenes.video_prompt: A yellow cartoon bear stands in front of an orange wooden door, looking confused then terrified. Cut to a massive green pea vine climbing into the sky, with a white rabbit and brown kitten clinging to it, visibly frightened. The sky is bright blue with soft clouds, and lush green bushes surround a cozy cottage. Text appears: 'The pea vine suddenly grew too big!' Natural lighting, vibrant colors, and smooth animation convey suspense. Wide shot transitions to close-ups of characters’ faces. 4K resolution, 24fps, soft shadows, Pixar-style rendering.

style_elements.characters: Yellow bear with round eyes, expressive face; white rabbit and brown kitten with exaggerated emotions
style_elements.environment: Outdoor countryside with cottage, blue sky, green plants, giant pea vine
style_elements.visual_style: Bright, cartoonish, Pixar-inspired animation with soft lighting and vivid colors
style_elements.camera_movement: Wide establishing shot to dynamic close-ups on characters

scenes.description: 小兔子微笑闭眼,随后与小熊、老鼠站在房子前讨论。老鼠坚定地拉扯藤蔓,显示‘必须扳倒曼藤’的文字,情节转向行动决心。
scenes.video_prompt: A white rabbit smiles peacefully, eyes closed, then opens them with determination. It stands beside the yellow bear and a small gray mouse in front of the orange cottage. The mouse gestures firmly toward the giant vine, pulling at a tendril with resolve. On-screen text reads: 'We must bring down the Man-Vine!' Sunny daylight, rich green grass, and gentle wind animate the leaves. Characters show unity and courage. Medium group shot, slight dolly-in for emphasis. 4K, 24fps, warm tones, stylized textures, emotional expressiveness.

style_elements.characters: White rabbit, yellow bear, small gray mouse with bold expressions
style_elements.environment: Front yard of cottage, sunny day, green landscape
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical animation with emotional depth, soft shading, high clarity
style_elements.camera_movement: Medium shot with slow dolly-in to highlight decision moment

scenes.description: 小兔子手持工具准备行动,在果园中行走,小熊拿着植物茎微笑,展现积极准备和探索氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: The white rabbit carries a small gardening tool, walking purposefully through a colorful orchard filled with pumpkins, apple trees, and flowers. Its expression is focused yet excited. Cut to the yellow bear standing in a meadow, holding a green plant stem, smiling warmly. Background includes distant cottages and fluttering birds. Bright natural light enhances red apples, purple blooms, and green foliage. Sense of adventure and teamwork. Tracking shot follows rabbit; static medium shot of bear. 4K, 24fps, cheerful tone, detailed textures.

style_elements.characters: Rabbit with tool, bear holding plant, both cheerful and determined
style_elements.environment: Orchard and meadow with fruit trees, pumpkins, wildflowers
style_elements.visual_style: Lively cartoon style with rich environmental detail and warm lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Tracking shot on rabbit, static medium on bear

scenes.description: 角色们合力应对藤蔓危机,小熊鼓励大家,决定共同解决问题,展现团结与希望。
scenes.video_prompt: The yellow bear comforts the frightened rabbit and kitten, placing a reassuring paw on their shoulders. The gray mouse points upward, explaining a plan. All three stand together beneath the towering pea vine now entangled around the roof. Dialogue text: 'Don’t worry—we can solve this together!' Sky shows late morning light, leaves rustle in breeze. Emphasis on camaraderie and bravery. Group wide shot, slight low angle to emphasize height of vine. 4K, 24fps, emotional warmth, soft focus background, character-driven storytelling.

style_elements.characters: Bear as leader, rabbit and kitten scared but hopeful, mouse as strategist
style_elements.environment: Cottage rooftop area, vine wrapped around chimney and roof
style_elements.visual_style: Expressive animation with emotional nuance and clear visual narrative
style_elements.camera_movement: Wide group shot with low-angle perspective on vine

scenes.description: 小兔子勇敢攀爬藤蔓救援小猫,成功将其救下,但小猫却想继续玩耍,增添幽默感。
scenes.video_prompt: The white rabbit climbs the giant pea vine with agility, hand-over-hand, determined to reach the kitten stranded near the roof peak. Wind sways the vine slightly. Close-up on rabbit’s focused face. It reaches the top, grabs the kitten, and begins descending. Upon landing, the kitten giggles: 'We wanted to keep playing!' Rabbit looks surprised. Bear laughs. Light-hearted relief fills the scene. Dynamic climbing sequence with shaky cam effect, then stable ground shot. 4K, 24fps, action-comedy tone, bouncy animation.

style_elements.characters: Rabbit as hero, kitten playful, bear supportive
style_elements.environment: High on vine, rooftop level, garden below
style_elements.visual_style: Action-packed cartoon with comedic timing and fluid motion

scenes.description: 小胡（老鼠）进入仓库制作工具或食物,其他角色等待,充满期待与好奇。
scenes.video_prompt: The gray mouse—'Xiao Hu'—dashes into a wooden shed labeled 'Storage'. Inside, pots clang, flour puffs into the air as he stirs a large pot over a tiny stove. On-screen text: 'What is he cooking?' Other characters peek through the window, eyes wide with anticipation. Warm golden light from lanterns illuminates dust particles. Comedic chaos with flying utensils. Cut to outside where bear and rabbit whisper. Overhead shot of workshop, then close-up on bubbling pot. 4K, 24fps, whimsy and humor, detailed interior design.

style_elements.characters: Mouse (Xiao Hu) energetic and clever, others curious observers
style_elements.environment: Wooden warehouse interior with tools, shelves, and kitchen setup
style_elements.visual_style: Playful animation with slapstick elements and warm lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Overhead shot, close-ups, peek-through window angles

scenes.description: 小胡成功制作出解决方案,众人尝试新发明,气氛热烈,充满成就感。
scenes.video_prompt: Xiao Hu bursts out of the shed holding a steaming bowl of glowing green porridge. He presents it proudly: 'Pea Power Soup!' The bear sniffs cautiously, then smiles. They pour it onto the vine base—the vine glows and slowly retracts. Cheers erupt. Slow-motion celebration with confetti-like pea pods falling. Camera circles the group in joy. Golden hour lighting enhances emotional payoff. 4K, 24fps, magical realism, soft lens flare, upbeat music cues.

style_elements.characters: Mouse triumphant, bear and rabbit amazed and joyful
style_elements.environment: Garden at golden hour, vine reacting magically
style_elements.visual_style: Fantasy-infused animation with glowing effects and celebratory tone

scenes.description: 众人将豌豆藤送往公园作为盆景,赋予其新家,体现环保与再利用理念。
scenes.video_prompt: The team drags the shrunken pea vine on a wooden cart toward a sunny park. Children wave as they pass. They plant it in a flower bed marked 'Magic Pea Garden'. A sign is placed: 'Do Not Climb – But You Can Look!'. Soft piano music plays. Time-lapse shows vine thriving as ornamental plant. Wide panoramic shot of park with families enjoying nature. Message of care and responsibility. 4K, 24fps, serene pacing, gentle transitions, eco-friendly theme.

style_elements.characters: All three animals working together, proud and gentle
style_elements.environment: Public park with flower beds, benches, children playing
style_elements.visual_style: Peaceful, educational animation with soft color palette

scenes.description: 购物归来发现小猫在怀里睡觉,妈妈寻来,温馨家庭团聚场景。
scenes.video_prompt: The yellow bear returns from a market bag in paw, surprised to find the kitten asleep in its arms. A mother cat approaches, relieved: 'There you are!' Kitten wakes, blinks, nuzzles both. Bear gently hands it over. Hugs exchanged. Sunset casts long shadows, warm oranges and pinks fill the sky. Emotional music swells. Close-ups on tender eye contact and soft touches. Static shots emphasize intimacy. 4K, 24fps, heartfelt tone, realistic emotion in cartoon form.

style_elements.characters: Bear gentle, kitten sleepy, mother cat affectionate
style_elements.environment: Village path near cottage, sunset lighting
style_elements.visual_style: Emotionally rich animation with soft focus and warm hues
style_elements.camera_movement: Close-ups, static compositions for emotional impact

scenes.description: 庆祝时刻,小胡献上豌豆饭,但提及巨大豌豆引发笑声,大家拒绝食用,幽默收尾。
scenes.video_prompt: Xiao Hu presents a giant bowl of steaming green peas: 'Celebration Pea Rice!' Everyone claps—then freezes. Rabbit whispers: 'After that monster vine? No thanks!' They all burst into laughter. Bear pretends to faint dramatically. Xiao Hu shrugs, eats alone with gusto. Playful slapstick ensues. Table set with napkins, party hats. Bright midday sun, cheerful music. Medium group shots, zoom-ins on reactions. 4K, 24fps, comedy-focused, exaggerated facial expressions.

style_elements.environment: Outdoor picnic table near cottage, festive decorations
style_elements.visual_style: Comedic cartoon with timing and physical humor
style_elements.camera_movement: Zoom-ins, medium group reactions, punchline timing

scenes.description: 最后举行盛大的豌豆舞会,大家一起跳舞庆祝,欢乐节日氛围达到高潮。
scenes.video_prompt: A vibrant dance party begins—'The Great Pea Dance Festival!' Colorful lights blink, pea-shaped balloons float. Characters dance in circle, hop, spin. Music swells with folk rhythm. Confetti rains down. Silhouettes against twilight sky. Final wide shot shows entire village joining. Panda band plays on stage made of vines. Joy radiates. Dynamic camera movements: sweeping crane, rotating dolly. 4K, 24fps, festival energy, saturated colors, cinematic finish.

style_elements.characters: All animals dancing joyfully, expressive movements
style_elements.environment: Nighttime village square transformed into festival ground
style_elements.visual_style: Festive, musical animation with high energy and vivid visuals
style_elements.camera_movement: Crane shot, rotating dolly, dynamic crowd coverage
